items.title: Meta Turns to Space-Based Solar Energy to Power AI Data Centers on Earth
items.summary: Facebook parent company Meta secured up to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power as AI drives demand for electricity.

items.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
items.summary: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

items.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
items.summary: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

items.title: Galaxy Digital delivers first data center tranche to CoreWeave after narrowing Q1 loss
items.summary: Galaxy secured approval to double its Helios data center power capacity to over 1.6GW, building on its strategic expansion into AI infrastructure.

items.title: New wallet offers way to tackle Bitcoin’s quantum risk without a fork
items.summary: The Postquant Labs project uses Arch Network to deliver post-quantum signature protection without a Bitcoin soft fork, sidestepping both Jameson Lopp's freeze proposal and Paul Sztorc's hard fork.

items.title: Stablecoin payroll gets built-in yield with Paxos–Toku integration
items.summary: The integration lets employees earn yield on stablecoin-paid salaries without moving funds or giving up custody.

items.title: Aave-linked DeFi United unveils rsETH recovery plan after $293M Kelp exploit
items.summary: DeFi United published a technical plan to restore rsETH backing and unwind attacker-linked DeFi positions after the $293 million Kelp exploit.

items.title: Visa is teaming up with a Tether co-founder to build onchain banks
items.summary: Collins wants to bring robust stablecoin payments infrastructure to under-banked people around the planet.

items.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
items.summary: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) drops 1.7% as index moves lower
items.summary: Hedera (HBAR), down 0.9% since Monday, was also an underperformer.

items.title: CFTC's AI will review U.S. crypto registration applications, chairman tells CoinDesk
items.summary: The regulator is working on new technology to stretch abilities of reduced staff, says Chairman Mike Selig, including AI monitoring of trading data.

items.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
items.summary: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

items.title: Stablecoin transfer volume drops 19% even as supply keeps rising: RWA.xyz
items.summary: Stablecoin transfer volume fell more than 19% in 30 days even as supply, holders and active addresses continued to climb.

items.title: Bitcoin's Next Move Hinges on $82K CME Gap as Earnings, FOMC Loom
items.summary: Big Tech earnings and the FOMC are challenging investor risk appetite, with $82K as a make-or-break level for Bitcoin’s recovery rally.

items.summary: Tokenized stock holders can now participate in corporate governance, closing a long-standing gap between onchain securities and their traditional counterparts.

items.title: Is Ethereum safe above $2K? Traders are watching these ETH price levels
items.summary: Ethereum market participants saw the 100-day SMA at $2,200 as particularly important for bulls to hold to avoid a deeper correction.

items.title: Jack Dorsey's Block nears 9,000 bitcoin in treasury after Q1 addition

items.title: Bitcoin miner Core Scientific shifts to AI with 1.5GW data center push

items.title: Bitmine's ether buys are catching up to Strategy's bitcoin accumulation pace
